dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.healthOverview: Here's your health overview for today

aiSummary.title: AI Summary for Today
aiSummary.carbsBalanced: Your carb intake is well-balanced. Keep up the
aiSummary.breakfastSpike: Breakfast carbs yesterday caused a spike. Try
aiSummary.reduceRice: reducing rice portion to ½ cup
aiSummary.patternDetected: Pattern Detected: Post-meal spikes after lunch (3 days). Consider 10-min walk after eating.

glucosePrediction.title: Predicted Glucose (Next 4 Hours)
glucosePrediction.peakTiming: Your glucose typically peaks 90 minutes after meals. Plan accordingly.

lifestyleCoach.title: AI Lifestyle Coach
lifestyleCoach.improvesGlucose: after lunch improves glucose by 10–25 mg/dL.
lifestyleCoach.beforeBreakfast: before breakfast to reduce fasting spikes.

insulinRange.title: AI Predicted Insulin Range
insulinRange.basedOnDays: Based on similar days, your typical daily insulin falls between:
insulinRange.consultWarning: Always consult your doctor before making changes to your insulin dosage.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.logAndMonitor: Log and monitor your glucose levels

healthScore.title: Your Health Score
healthScore.excellent: Excellent diabetes management! Keep up the great work.
healthScore.good: Good progress. Focus on consistency for better results.
healthScore.improve: Let's work on improving your glucose control. Start with regular monitoring.

profile.title: Health Profile
profile.setupComplete: Your profile has been configured successfully

aiInsights.title: AI-Powered Insights
aiInsights.patternExcellent: Excellent glucose control! Your levels stay within target range most of the time.
aiInsights.patternFluctuate: Your glucose tends to fluctuate. Consider adjusting meal timing and insulin doses.
aiInsights.reduceCarbs: Consider reducing carb intake for better control.
aiInsights.logForInsights: Log your glucose and meals to receive personalized AI recommendations
aiInsights.walking: Post-meal walks of 15-20 minutes can help reduce glucose spikes by up to 25%. Try walking after your largest meal.

trends.glucosePatterns: Your glucose patterns over the past week

glucose.title: Glucose Monitoring
glucose.subtitle: Monitor your blood glucose levels and trends
glucose.noReadings: No readings yet. Record your first reading!

trends.title: Glucose Trends
trends.noData: No glucose data available for the selected period
trends.startLogging: Start logging your glucose to see trends
trends.missedEntry: Missed an entry? You can add readings for past dates and times.
trends.insulinOnlyIfTaken: Enter insulin only if it was actually taken and prescribed by your doctor.
trends.carbLoggingHelps: Carbohydrate logging helps explain post-meal glucose changes.

insulin.title: Insulin Tracking
insulin.subtitle: AI-powered insulin predictions and tracking
insulin.basedOnData: Based on your medical reports, current glucose levels, and health metrics
insulin.recommendationText: The AI has analyzed your latest medical reports and current health data.

calculator.title: Insulin Prediction Calculator
calculator.description: Safe, explainable insulin dosing based on your glucose, carbs, and insulin parameters
calculator.icrTooltip: Insulin to Carb Ratio (ICR) tells you how much insulin to take per gram of carbs. For example, 1:10 means 1 unit of insulin per 10g of carbs.
calculator.isfTooltip: Insulin Sensitivity Factor (ISF) tells you how much 1 unit of insulin will lower your blood glucose. For example, an ISF of 40 means 1 unit lowers glucose by 40 mg/dL.
calculator.reviewDetails: Please review the details before applying this insulin dose
calculator.safetyReminderText: Always check your glucose before administering insulin. If you have any doubts, consult your healthcare provider.

food.title: Log Meals
food.subtitle: Track your nutrition and meal intake
food.tapMicPrompt: Tap mic to log your meal
food.foodPlaceholder: e.g., 2 chapati with dal, biryani 200g, dosa idli sambar, chicken salad
food.tipSpelling: 💡 Tip: Just type what you ate - spelling doesn't need to be perfect!
food.voicePlaceholder: e.g., I ate two idlis with sambar, or chicken biryani 250 grams
food.tipVoice: 💡 Tip: Speak naturally - say food name and quantity

analysis.title: AI Nutritional Analysis
analysis.carbRatioNote: This meal contains {{carbs}}g of carbs. Consider your insulin-to-carb ratio when dosing.

messages.noInputDesc: Please enter or speak a meal description first
messages.genericEstimationDesc: Could not identify specific food. Showing average meal values. You can adjust manually.
messages.speechNotSupportedDesc: Speech Recognition is not supported in your browser

medicalFeedback.title: 🩺 Personalized Medical Feedback
medicalFeedback.subtitle: Based on your {{type}} diabetes profile
medicalFeedback.disclaimer: These are personalized insights for educational purposes. Always consult your healthcare provider.
medicalFeedback.type2HighCarb: For Type 2 diabetes, this high-carb meal may cause a prolonged glucose spike. Consider reducing portion size.
medicalFeedback.type2ModerateCarb: This moderate-carb meal should be manageable, but monitor your post-meal glucose levels.
medicalFeedback.type1Bolus: Consider bolus insulin dosing for {{carbs}}g carbs. Consult your insulin-to-carb ratio.
medicalFeedback.prediabetic: As pre-diabetic, focus on portion control and pair carbs with protein/fiber to reduce glucose impact.
medicalFeedback.riceDelayed: Your past records show delayed glucose normalization after rice-based meals. Monitor 2-3 hours post-meal.
medicalFeedback.fiberBenefit: High fiber content ({{fiber}}g) may partially offset the glucose rise from carbohydrates.
medicalFeedback.proteinBalance: Good protein content will help slow carbohydrate absorption and reduce glucose spikes.
medicalFeedback.monitorPostMeal: Monitor glucose 90-120 minutes post-meal for this moderate-to-high impact food.
medicalFeedback.lowTimeInRange: Your recent time-in-range is below target. Consider smaller portions or lower-GI alternatives.

aiFood.title: AI Food Log
aiFood.subtitle: AI-powered meal analysis

alerts.highSugar: ⚠️ HIGH SUGAR ALERT: {{food}} has very high glycemic impact (GI: {{gi}})! May cause rapid blood sugar spikes.
alerts.moderateSugar: ⚠️ MODERATE WARNING: {{food}} may cause moderate blood sugar rise. Consider portion control.
alerts.lowSugar: ✅ DIABETES-FRIENDLY: Good choice! {{food}} has low glycemic impact.

header.title: Intelligent Nutrition & Carb Logging
header.subtitle: AI-powered meal analysis with Indian food understanding

aiFood.disclaimer: Educational Purpose Only: Nutrition values and health impact are estimates and may not be fully accurate. Always follow your doctor or dietitian's advice.

glucoseInsulin.quickLogging: Quick and easy logging for better management
glucoseInsulin.enterCurrentGlucose: Enter your current blood glucose level
glucoseInsulin.personalizedRecommendations: Personalized recommendations based on your reading
glucoseInsulin.logNextMeal: Log your next meal for better insights
glucoseInsulin.readingsWillAppear: Your recent glucose readings will appear here

settings.title: Settings
settings.rerunTutorial: Re-run the first-time setup tutorial on next page load
settings.dataExportBegin: Your data export will begin shortly
settings.tutorialRerun: You can now re-run the tutorial on next page load

selectRole.title: Select Your Role
selectRole.description: Choose which role you'd like to explore
selectRole.patientDescription: Manage your glucose levels and health data
selectRole.providerDescription: Manage patient records and provide care

auth.welcomeMessage: Welcome to GlucoNova! Please login to get started.
auth.accountReviewNotice: Your account will be reviewed by our admin team. You'll receive an email notification upon approval.

doctor.subtitle: Manage your patients and review their health data
doctor.name: Name
doctor.selectPatient: Select a patient to view their health data

voiceAI.title: Voice AI Assistant
voiceAI.subtitle: Log meals and get health insights using voice commands

foodLogging.title: Food Logging
foodLogging.subtitle: Tap the microphone to log your meal using voice

aiAnalysis.title: AI Nutritional Analysis
aiAnalysis.carbInfo: This meal contains {{carbs}}g of carbs. Consider your insulin-to-carb ratio when dosing.

voiceTips.title: Voice Tips
voiceTips.example1: I ate chicken with rice and vegetables
voiceTips.example2: Had a banana and yogurt for breakfast
voiceTips.example3: Just had pasta with salmon, about 200 grams
voiceTips.example4: Consumed pizza and salad for lunch

search.title: Medication Search
search.noResults: No medications found. Try a different search term.

info.detectionFailed: I couldn't detect meal information. Try saying something like "I ate chicken with rice and vegetables"

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Manage user approvals and system settings

onboarding.stepDescription: Complete your profile setup to get personalized health insights

welcome.title: Welcome to GlucoNova
welcome.description: Your AI-powered diabetes management platform. Let's take a quick tour of what you can do!

features.title: Available Features
features.description: Everything you need to manage your diabetes effectively

glucose.title: Glucose Monitoring
glucose.description: Track your blood glucose levels with visual trends and insights

insulin.title: AI Insulin Prediction
insulin.description: Get personalized insulin recommendations powered by AI

meal.title: Meal Tracking
meal.description: Log meals manually or use voice input for easy tracking

medication.title: Medication Management
medication.description: Keep track of your medications and schedules

doctor.title: Doctor Collaboration
doctor.description: Share your data with your healthcare team securely

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.description: Log meals hands-free using voice commands

upload.title: Upload Health Records
upload.description: Upload a PDF of your health summary to auto-extract your information
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your PDF here

existing.title: Select Existing Report
existing.description: Choose from your previously uploaded medical reports
existing.uploadToStart: Upload a medical report to get started

confirm.title: Confirm Your Information
confirm.description: Review and edit the extracted data

manual.title: Enter Your Details
manual.description: Fill in your health information manually

finish.title: All Set!
finish.description: Your account is ready. You can now access personalized health insights and AI-powered insulin predictions.

banner.addHealthInfo: Add your health information to get personalized AI-powered insights

messages.fileSizeLimit: Please upload a file smaller than 20MB
messages.parsingFailedDesc: Could not extract data from document. Please enter details manually.
messages.parsingSuccessDesc: Extracted {{count}} field(s) from your report. Please review and confirm.
messages.parsingPartialDesc: Some fields were extracted. Please review and fill in missing information.
messages.supportedFileTypes: Please upload a PDF, JPEG, or PNG file
messages.reportLoadedDesc: Patient information has been populated. Please review and confirm.
messages.loadPatientFailed: Failed to load patient details from report
messages.dobRequiredDesc: Please enter your date of birth
messages.validWeightRequiredDesc: Please enter a valid weight in kg
messages.validHeightRequiredDesc: Please enter a valid height in cm
messages.healthDataSaved: Your health data has been saved
messages.saveProfileErrorDesc: Please try again or contact support

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences and settings
settings.savedDesc: Your settings have been updated successfully

settings.languageChangedDesc: Your language preference has been updated
settings.notificationsDesc: Manage how you receive updates and alerts
settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Receive push notifications on your device

settings.privacySecurityDesc: Manage your password and security settings
settings.appearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of the app
settings.darkModeDesc: Use dark theme throughout the app

reports.subtitle: Reports & Medical Documents
reports.description: Upload, manage, and analyze your medical reports

reports.goToDocuments: Go to Documents & OCR page to upload and analyze your reports

documentsOCR.title: Documents & OCR
documentsOCR.pageDescription: Upload medical reports for AI-powered data extraction and insulin prediction
documentsOCR.aiInsulinPrediction: AI Insulin Prediction Based on Extracted Data
documentsOCR.basedOnExtractedData: Based on extracted medical data, the AI recommends:

documentsOCR.uploadFirstReport: Upload your first medical report to get started with AI analysis

documentsOCR.aiExtracted: AI extracted {{count}} medical data points from your report
documentsOCR.elevatedA1c: HbA1c ({{value}}%) is elevated - consult with healthcare provider
documentsOCR.aiAnalysisComplete: AI analysis completed - review extracted data above
